mapper.select:
select a.id, a.name, a.org_id, a.plan_class_hour as year_class_hour_require from xm_person a left join sys_org b on a.org_id = b.id left join xm_person_course_relate c on a.id = c.person_id where a.is_delete = 0 and a.state = 1 and a.is_admin = 2
and (a.org_id = #{orgId} or b.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId} ,']%'))
and c.project_id = #{projectId}
and a.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT a.id, project_name, IFNULL(train_sdate, IFNULL(practice_sdate, exam_sdate)) AS startDate, IFNULL(exam_edate, IFNULL(practice_edate, train_edate)) AS endDate, a.total_learn_hours AS must_class_hour, b.learn_hours AS already_class_hour, IF(b.is_sign = 3, 1, 0) AS finish_state FROM xm_project a LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate b ON a.id = b.project_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.project_type = 1 AND a.project_status IN (3, 4) AND b.is_delete = 0 AND b.person_id = #{personId}
AND a.project_name like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%')
AND b.is_sign in (1, 2)
AND b.is_sign = 3
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT b.id, b.course_name, (SELECT SUM(c.learn_hours) FROM xm_courseware c LEFT JOIN xm_course_relation_courseware d ON c.id = d.courseware_id WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.course_id = b.id) AS must_class_hour, (SELECT SUM(study_hours) FROM xm_project_person_study_record WHERE is_delete = 0 AND person_id = #{personId} AND project_id = a.project_id AND course_id = b.id) AS already_class_hour FROM xm_project_relate a LEFT JOIN xm_course b ON a.relate_ids = b.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND a.project_id = #{projectId} AND a.type = 2
AND b.course_name like concat('%', #{courseName}, '%')
ORDER BY a.sort

SELECT id as report_id, submit_time as hand_date, answer_time as test_time, score as test_result FROM xm_answer_report WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND type = 2 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.train_name AS project_name, a.train_sdate AS start_date, a.train_edate AS end_date, a.train_address AS train_addr, b.sign_time AS sign_in_time, IF(b.sign_time IS NULL, 0, 1) AS finish_state FROM xm_project_terminal_train a LEFT JOIN xm_project_terminal_train_sign b ON a.id = b.train_id WHERE b.person_id = #{personId}
AND a.train_name LIKE concat('%', #{projectName}, '%')
